zh.lifeSummary: Isabell Treadway是John Treadway和Isabell Hill的女兒，於1591年6月14日出生在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特。她於1621年6月4日與Nathaniel Childe在英國英格蘭倫敦維斯特明斯特結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1649年在她的家鄉享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isabell Treadway是John Treadway和Isabell Hill的女儿，于1591年6月14日出生在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特。她于1621年6月4日与Nathaniel Childe在英国英格兰倫敦維斯特明斯特结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1649年在她的家乡享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Treadway
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English treden ‘to tread, trample’ + wei(e) ‘way’, perhaps used for a vagrant or a well-traveled man.

variants.name: Tredway
meanings: English: variant of   Treadway  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Isabell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Isabell Treadway was born on 14 June 1591, in Westminster, Middlesex, England as the daughter of John Treadway and Isabell Hill. She married Nathaniel Childe on 4 June 1621, in Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 9 daughters. She died in 1649, in her hometown, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabell Treadway est née le 14 juin 1591, à Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, fille de John Treadway et Isabell Hill. Elle a épousé Nathaniel Childe le 4 juin 1621, à Westminster, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée en 1649, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Isabell Treadway è nata il il 14 giugno 1591 nel Westminster, Middlesex, England come figlia di John Treadway e Isabell Hill. Lei sposato Nathaniel Childe il 4 giugno 1621, nel Westminster, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 9 figlie. Morì nel 1649, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabell Treadwayは1591年6月14日にイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターでJohn TreadwayとIsabell Hillの娘として生まれた。1621年6月4日にイギリスイギリスロンドンウエストミンスターでNathaniel Childeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1649年に故郷で58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabell Treadway(은)는 1591년 6월 14일 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에서 John Treadway(와)과 Isabell Hill의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1621년 6월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터에서 Nathaniel Childe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1649년 그녀의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Isabell Treadway nasceu em 14 de junho de 1591, em Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra filha de John Treadway e Isabell Hill. Ela casou-se com Nathaniel Childe em 4 de junho de 1621, em Westminster, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1649, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabell Treadway родилась 14 июня 1591 г. в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия. Её родителей звали John Treadway и Isabell Hill. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nathaniel Childe 4 июня 1621 г. в местности вестминстир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Она умерла в 1649 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Isabell Treadway nació el 14 de junio de 1591, en Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra como hija de John Treadway y Isabell Hill. Se casó con Nathaniel Childe el 4 de junio de 1621, en Westminster, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió en 1649, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años.
